However, some minor issues include 'lilac' left untranslated (should be 'lila'), slightly awkward phrasing in 'bolsas de asiento persas' (better as 'almohadillas persas'), and 'captar apenas' feeling less poetic than the original 'could just catch'—these small choices slightly diminish the lyrical fluency and aesthetic precision char

results.translated_text: "Has estado en Afganistán, puedo percibir." "¿Cómo diablos lo supiste?" pregunté asombrado. "No importa", dijo él, riéndose para sí. "La pregunta ahora es sobre la hemoglobina. No dudo que veas la significancia de este descubrimiento mío?" "Es interesante, químicamente, no dudo", respondí, "pero en lo práctico—" "¡Vaya, hombre! Es el descubrimiento más práctico en materia de derecho médico durante años. ¿No ves que nos da una prueba infalible para detectar manchas de sangre?"

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but has notable issues: the opening phrase is grammatically awkward ('puedo percibir' should be 'percibo'), and several expressions feel stilted rather than natural dialogue. The tone shifts from Holmes's characteristic deductive confidence to something more uncertain, and some phrasing choices ('No dudo que veas' instead of 'Sin duda ves') weaken the original's assertiveness.

results.translated_text: Fui a los bosques porque deseaba vivir deliberadamente, hacer frente solo a los hechos esenciales de la vida, y ver si podía aprender lo que tenía que enseñar, y no, al llegar a morir, descubrir que no había vivido. No deseaba vivir lo que no era vida, pues la vida es tan preciosa; ni practicar la resignación, a menos que fuera absolutamente necesario. Quería vivir profundamente y sacar toda la savia de la vida.

scores.feedback: The translation faithfully preserves Thoreau's philosophical meaning and existential urgency with only minor deviations. The rendering of 'suck out all the marrow' as 'sacar toda la savia' is a thoughtful cultural adaptation that maintains the visceral intensity, though 'marrow' carries slightly different connotations than 'sap.'

results.translated_text: Llámame Ishmael. Hace algunos años—no importa cuánto tiempo exactamente—teniendo poco o nada de dinero en mi bolsillo, y nada particular que me interesara en tierra, pensé que me gustaría navegar un poco y ver la parte acuática del mundo. Es una manera que tengo de despejar la tristeza y regular la circulación. Cada vez que me encuentre creciendo serio en los labios; cada vez que sea un noviembre húmedo y empalagoso en mi alma, considero que es hora alta de llegar al mar cuanto antes.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning but loses some nuance: 'driving off the spleen' becomes 'despejar la tristeza' (clearing sadness), which is less precise; 'growing grim about the mouth' as 'creciendo serio en los labios' is awkward and unclear. The archaic, contemplative tone of the original is diminished, and phrases like 'hora alta' feel forced rather than naturally archaic in Spanish.

results.translated_text: È un fatto universalmente riconosciuto che un uomo single in possesso di una buona fortuna debba necessariamente cercare una moglie. Tuttavia poco conosciute siano le sensazioni o le opinioni di un uomo così appena entrato in un quartiere, questa verità è così ben radicata nei cuori delle famiglie circostanti, che viene considerato come la proprietà legittima di una o l'altra delle loro figlie.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but uses 'single' (English loanword) instead of the more natural Italian 'scapolo,' and 'quartiere' (neighborhood/district) is less precise than needed. The syntax becomes awkward in places ('Tuttavia poco conosciute siano') and loses some of Austen's ironic elegance; the original's measured, witty tone is somewhat diminished by the more formal, stilted phrasing.

results.translated_text: Lo studio era riempito dell'odore intenso di rose, e quando il leggero soffio estivo si muoveva tra gli alberi del giardino, si diffondeva attraverso la porta aperta l'odore pesante del lillà o il profumo delicato della rosa selvatica. Dal angolo del divano con i cuscini persiani su cui si distendeva, fumando come era suo costume, innumerevoli sigarette, Lord Henry Wotton poteva appena cogliere la scintilla dei fiori gialli come miele del laburnum.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meanings but contains notable errors: 'pink-flowering thorn' is mistranslated as 'rosa selvatica' (wild rose), and 'honey-sweet and honey-coloured blossoms' becomes awkwardly 'fiori gialli come miele' (yellow flowers like honey), losing the poetic doubling. The phrase 'si diffondeva' disrupts the sensory flow compared to the original's parallel structure, and overall the aesthetic refinement of Wilde's prose is somewhat diminished.

results.translated_text: "Sei stato in Afghanistan, capisco." "Come mai hai saputo che?" chiesi stupito. "Non importa," disse lui, ridendo tra sé. "La questione ora è l'emoglobina. Non c'è dubbio che tu abbia compreso l'importanza di questa mia scoperta?" "È interessante, chimicamente, non c'è dubbio," risposi, "ma praticamente—" "Perbacco, uomo, è la scoperta medico-legale più pratica da anni. Non vedi che ci dà un test infallibile per le tracce di sangue?"

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys most meanings but has minor issues: 'Come mai hai saputo che?' is grammatically awkward (should be 'Come hai saputo?'), and 'la scoperta medico-legale più pratica da anni' awkwardly renders 'most practical medico-legal discovery for years.' The style loses some of Holmes's Victorian formality and Watson's astonishment, though the dialogue remains generally natural and readable.

results.translated_text: Andai nei boschi perché volevo vivere con deliberazione, affrontare solo i fatti essenziali della vita e vedere se non potevo imparare ciò che aveva da insegnare, e non scoprire, quando sarei arrivato alla morte, che non avevo vissuto. Non volevo vivere ciò che non era vita, la vita è così cara; né volevo esercitare la resa, a meno che non fosse necessario. Volevo vivere profondamente e succhiare tutta la sostanza della vita.

scores.feedback: The translation preserves Thoreau's meaning and philosophical intent well, with accurate rendering of key concepts like 'deliberazione' and 'sostanza della vita.' However, some phrasing feels slightly stiff ('esercitare la resa' is awkward), and the poetic rhythm of the original is somewhat diminished, particularly in the famous 'suck out all the marrow' passage.

results.translated_text: Mi chiamo Ishmael. Alcuni anni fa – non importa quanto precisamente – avendo poco o nulla di denaro nel mio portafoglio, e nulla di particolare a interessarmi in terraferma, pensai di viaggiare un po’ e di vedere la parte umida del mondo. È un modo che ho per scacciarmi lo spleen e regolare la circolazione. Ogni volta che mi accorgo di diventare serio in volto; ogni volta che è un novembre umido e piovoso nel mio animo, ritengo che sia tempo di raggiungere il mare il prima possibile.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys most meaning but loses some nuance: 'watery part' becomes 'parte umida' (wet part) rather than capturing the poetic quality, and 'growing grim about the mouth' is simplified to 'diventare serio in volto' (becoming serious-faced). The archaic, introspective tone is somewhat diminished in the Italian version, which reads more straightforwardly than Melville's deliberately mannered prose.

results.translated_text: É uma verdade universalmente reconhecida, que um homem solteiro em posse de uma fortuna precisa de uma esposa. Quanto menos conhecidas sejam as emoções ou opiniões de tal homem ao chegar pela primeira vez a uma vizinhança, essa verdade está tão firmemente enraizada nas mentes das famílias vizinhas, que ele é considerado a propriedade legítima de uma ou outra de suas filhas.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the meaning and maintains the ironic tone of Austen's opening, though 'precisa de' (needs) is slightly less elegant than the original's 'must be in want of,' which carries more ironic weight. The prose flows naturally in Portuguese with good vocabulary choices, though some of the original's subtle satirical bite is marginally diminished.

results.translated_text: O estúdio estava cheio do cheiro denso de rosas, e quando o leve vento de verão agitava as árvores do jardim, vinha através da porta aberta o cheiro denso das lilases ou o perfume mais delicado das tufas rosadas. Do canto do divã de almofadas persas onde ele estava deitado, fumando, como era seu costume, inúmeras cigarros, Lord Henry Wotton conseguia apenas vislumbrar o brilho das flores doce como mel e coloridas como mel do laburno.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning but has notable issues: 'tufas rosadas' is imprecise (should be 'espinheiro-alvo' or similar), 'inúmeras cigarros' has gender agreement error (should be 'inúmeros cigarros'), and the final phrase awkwardly renders 'honey-sweet and honey-coloured' as 'doce como mel e coloridas como mel,' losing the poetic parallel structure and aesthetic precision of Wilde's original sensory language.

results.translated_text: "Você esteve no Afeganistão, percebo." "Como diabos você soube disso?" perguntei, em espanto. "Não importa", disse ele, rindo consigo mesmo. "A questão agora é sobre a hemoglobina. Não duvido que você perceba a significância dessa descoberta minha?" "É interessante, quimicamente, sem dúvida", respondi, "mas pragmaticamente—" "Por que, homem, é a mais prática descoberta medico-jurídica em anos. Não percebe que nos dá um teste infalível para manchas de sangue?"

scores.feedback: The translation preserves meaning well with minor issues: 'Não duvido que' should be 'Não duvida que' (grammatical error), and 'pragmaticamente' is awkward—'na prática' would be more natural. The Victorian tone and Holmes's characteristic deductive manner are mostly maintained, though some phrasings feel slightly stiff for Portuguese dialogue.

results.translated_text: Fui aos bosques porque desejava viver deliberadamente, confrontar apenas as verdades essenciais da vida e ver se poderia aprender o que tinha a ensinar, e não descobrir, ao chegar à morte, que não tivesse vivido. Não desejava viver o que não era vida, pois a vida é tão cara; nem desejava praticar a resignação, a menos que fosse absolutamente necessário. Queria viver profundamente e extrair toda a substância da vida.

scores.feedback: The translation faithfully preserves Thoreau's meaning and philosophical intent, with excellent choices like 'confrontar' for 'front' and 'extrair toda a substância' for 'suck out all the marrow.' Minor issues include 'verdades essenciais' (truths) instead of 'fatos essenciais' (facts), and slight awkwardness in the conditional construction, but overall it maintains the contemplative tone and rhetorical power of the original.

results.translated_text: Me chamem Ishmael. Há alguns anos—nunca importa por quanto tempo exatamente—com pouco ou nenhum dinheiro no meu bolso e nada particular para me interessar na terra, pensei em navegar um pouco e ver a parte aquática do mundo. É um jeito que tenho de aliviar a bile e regular a circulação. Quando me sinto cada vez mais sombrio nos lábios; quando é um dia chuvoso, úmido de novembro no meu espírito, acredito que é hora de ir ao mar o mais cedo possível.

scores.feedback: The translation preserves most meanings accurately, though 'Me chamem' is slightly awkward (should be 'Chamem-me') and 'aliviar a bile' captures 'spleen' well. The archaic tone is partially maintained but lacks some of the original's rhythmic elegance and philosophical weight in places like 'regulating the circulation.'

results.translated_text: Prawda uniwersalnie uznana, że samotny mężczyzna posiadający dobrą fortunę musi mieć żonę. Niezależnie od tego, jak niewielu zna uczucia lub poglądy takiego mężczyzny przy pierwszym wstępie do sąsiedztwa, ta prawda jest tak dobrze zakotwiczona w umysłach rodzin otaczających go, że jest uważany za prawdziwy majątek jednej z ich córek.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but loses some of Austen's ironic elegance and formal grace. The opening phrase 'Prawda uniwersalnie uznana' is awkward compared to the original's rhythmic opening, and 'musi mieć żonę' is less sophisticated than the original's 'must be in want of a wife,' which carries ironic social commentary. The sentence structure becomes clunky in places, particularly 'przy pierwszym wstępie do sąsiedztwa,' disrupting the flowing irony of the original prose.

results.translated_text: Studia zapachniały bogatym aromatem róż, a gdy lekki wiosenny wiatr poruszał się wśród drzew ogrodu, przez otwarte drzwi dochodził ciężki zapach lilii albo bardziej delikatny perfum różowych kwiatów kwiatuszków. Z rogu divanu, na którym leżał, paląc, jak to było jego zwyczajem, niekończące się liczby papierosów, Lord Henry Wotton mógł dostrzec błysk słodkich, słodkożółtych kwiatów laburnum.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning but has notable issues: 'różowych kwiatów kwiatuszków' is redundant and awkward, 'lilii' (lilies) should be 'bzu' (lilac), and 'słodkożółtych' is clunky compared to Wilde's elegant 'honey-sweet and honey-coloured.' The sensory richness and aesthetic refinement are somewhat diminished.

results.translated_text: „Zauważam, że byłeś w Afganistanie.” „Jak na ziemiu wiesz o tym?” – z niedowierzaniem zapytałem. „Nie ma znaczenia,” powiedział, chichotał do siebie. „Teraz chodzi o hemoglobiny. Nie ma wątpliwości, że zauważyłeś znaczenie mojego odkrycia?” „To interesujące z chemicznego punktu widzenia, nie ma wątpliwości,” odpowiedziałem, „ale praktycznie—” „Och, panie, to najbardziej praktyczne odkrycie medyczno-prawne w ciągu wielu lat. Nie rozumiesz, że daje nam niezawodny test na ślady krwi?”

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but contains grammatical issues ('hemoglobiny' should be 'hemoglobinę', 'chichotał' is awkward) and loses some of the Victorian dialogue's natural flow. The tone becomes slightly more formal and less conversational than the original.

results.translated_text: Chciałem pójść w las, ponieważ pragnąłem żyć zdecydowanie, stawić czoło tylko istotnym faktom życia i sprawdzić, czy nie mogłem się nauczyć, co miało do nauczenia, i nie odkryć, że nie żyłem, gdy przychodził mi zginąć. Nie pragnąłem żyć tym, co nie jest życiem, życie jest tak drogie; ani pragnąłem ćwiczyć rezygnację, chyba że była całkowicie konieczna. Pragnąłem żyć głęboko i wypić całą soknię życia.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most core meanings but contains significant structural and stylistic issues: awkward phrasing ('stawić czoło tylko'), grammatical errors ('nie mogłem się nauczyć' misrepresents the conditional), and 'soknię' (juice) is an incorrect word choice for 'marrow' (szpik). The philosophical weight and Thoreau's deliberate cadence are substantially diminished.

results.translated_text: Wezwij mnie Izmaela. Nieco wcześniej — nie ma znaczenia, jak długo dokładnie — mając niewiele lub wręcz żadnych pieniędzy w portfelu, i nic konkretnego, co mogłoby mnie zainteresować na lądzie, pomyślałem, że zacznę pływać po wodzie i zobaczyć wodną część świata. To sposób, w jaki usuwam złośliwą duszę i reguluję krążenie. Kiedyś, gdy zauważę, że moje usta zaczynają się zamykać w smutku; kiedyś, gdy będzie wilgotny, z deszczem listopad w mojej duszy, uznam, że najwyższa pora, by jak najszybciej zacząć pływać na morze.

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors: 'Wezwij mnie' (command form) should be 'Zowij mnie' or 'Nazywaj mnie' (imperative/habitual); 'Nieco wcześniej' misrepresents the temporal reference; 'portfelu' (wallet) is too modern for the archaic style; 'usuwam złośliwą duszę' (I remove malicious soul) completely distorts 'driving off the spleen'; and 'moje usta zaczynają się zamykać w smutku' (my mouth begins to close in sadness) misses the idiom entirely. The archaic, contemplative tone is lost i

results.translated_text: 这是一个被普遍认可的事实：凡是有丰厚财产的单身汉必定需要一位妻子。尽管这类男子初入某个社区时，其情感或观点可能鲜为人知，但这一真理在周围各家各户的脑海中根深蒂固，以至于他会被视为某个女儿的合法财产。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning and ironic tone effectively, preserving the satirical observation about marriage and fortune. However, some nuances are lost: '被普遍认可的事实' is slightly more formal than the original's ironic universality, and '合法财产' (legal property) misses the subtle irony of 'rightful property' which implies both legitimacy and possession. The fluency is slightly stiff in places, particularly in the conditional clause structure.

results.translated_text: 工作室里弥漫着浓郁的玫瑰花香，当轻柔的夏风拂过花园中的树丛时，透过敞开的门，便送来丁香浓郁的气息，或是粉红蔷薇细腻的芬芳。躺在波斯鞍袋制成的沙发角落里，习惯性地抽着无数支香烟的劳德·亨利·沃顿，恰好能瞥见蜜糖般甜美、蜜糖色的金链花的花蕊。

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the sensory details and meaning accurately, though 'pink-flowering thorn' is rendered as 'pink roses' (蔷薇) rather than hawthorn, and 'blossoms' becomes 'flower stamens' (花蕊), which slightly shifts the visual imagery. The aesthetic tone is mostly preserved but feels somewhat more straightforward than Wilde's ornate, flowing prose style.

results.translated_text: “你去过阿富汗，我察觉到了。”“你怎么会知道的？”我惊讶地问道。他轻声笑着说道：“管它呢。现在的问题是血红蛋白。你肯定明白我这项发现的意义吧？”“从化学角度来看，这确实很有趣，”我回答道，“但从实际应用来看——”“喂，你这人，这可是近年来最实用的法医学发现。你没看到吗？它能给我们提供绝对可靠的血迹检测方法？”

scores.feedback: The translation accurately captures the meaning and dialogue flow of the original text, with Holmes's deductive confidence and Watson's astonishment well-preserved. Minor stylistic adjustments ("管它呢" is slightly more casual than "Never mind") and the addition of "喂，你这人" slightly amplifies the tone compared to the original's more measured delivery, but overall maintains strong fidelity to both content and character voice.

results.translated_text: 我走进森林，是因为我想认真地生活，只面对生命的基本事实，看看是否能从中学到什么，以免临终时发现我从未真正活过。我不愿过非生活的生活，因为生活如此珍贵；也不愿轻易实践消极顺从，除非万不得已。我想深入地生活，汲取生命的所有精华。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core philosophical meaning and Thoreau's intent with strong fidelity, though 'living is so dear' becomes 'because life is so precious,' which slightly shifts the emphasis. The prose flows naturally in Chinese, though the repetitive structure of the original ('I did not wish...nor did I wish') is somewhat flattened, and the metaphorical intensity of 'suck out all the marrow' is reduced to the more literal 'extract all the essence.'

results.translated_text: 我叫以实玛利。几年前——具体多少年并不重要——我钱包里没有多少钱，也没有什么特别能让我感兴趣的陆上事物，于是我决定出海航行一番，去看看那片水域世界。这对我而言是一种驱散郁结、调节血液循环的方式。每当我发现自己嘴唇变得阴沉，或是我的灵魂如同阴雨连绵的十一月，我便认为此时正是该出海的时候了。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the essential meaning and philosophical tone of Melville's opening, though some nuances are lost—particularly the metaphorical precision of 'driving off the spleen' and the subtle shift from 'grim about the mouth' to 'lips becoming gloomy.' The archaic literary quality is somewhat diminished in the target language, reading more modern than the original's deliberate formality.

results.translated_text: 有一條真理是世人普遍承認的，那就是一個擁有豐厚財產的单身男子，必定需要娶妻。即使這樣一位男子對新社區的感觸與想法再怎麼少人知，這真理在周圍各家心中卻根深蒂固，以致於他被視為某位女兒的當然財產。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the ironic meaning and structure well, preserving Austen's satirical commentary on marriage and social expectations. Minor fluency issues exist with slightly awkward phrasing ('當然財產' for 'rightful property'), but the overall tone and meaning are faithfully rendered.

results.translated_text: 工作室裡瀰漫著濃郁的玫瑰香氣，當輕柔的夏季微風拂過園中的樹木時，透過敞開的門戶，會傳來濃厚的丁香香氣，或更細膩的粉紅花刺的香氣。他正躺臥在Persian鞍袋製成的長椅角落，依照慣例抽著無數支雪茄，此時他能瞥見金黃色花朵在金黃色枝條上閃爍，那花朵甜美的香氣如蜜般濃郁。

scores.feedback: The translation captures most key meanings but has notable issues: 'cigarettes' is mistranslated as '雪茄' (cigars), 'Persian saddle-bags' remains untranslated as 'Persian鞍袋', and the final description of laburnum blossoms becomes confusing with awkward phrasing. While the sensory richness is partially preserved, the fluency suffers from awkward constructions and the aesthetic precision of Wilde's prose is diminished.

results.translated_text: 「你似乎曾到過阿富汗。」「你怎麼會知道的？」我驚訝地問。他說完後自言自語地笑起來：「別管那麼多。現在的問題是血紅蛋白。你當然明白這個發現的意義嗎？」「從化學角度看確實有趣，」我回答，「但實際上——」「嘿，這可是多年來最實用的法醫學發現。你沒看見嗎？這能給我們一個無懈可擊的血跡檢測方法？」

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the meaning and maintains the detective story's intellectual tone, though 'Never mind' becomes 'Don't worry about it' (slightly softening Holmes's dismissiveness) and the dialogue flow could be more naturally paced in places. The scientific terminology and character dynamics are well-preserved.

results.translated_text: 我前往林中，是因為我想刻意生活，直面生命中最重要的事實，並試圖學習它能教給我的東西；我不想在臨終時發現自己未曾真正活過。我不願過虛偽的生活，因為生活如此珍貴；我也無意 practise 傳統的放棄，除非 absolutely 必要。我想深入生活，汲取生命最豐富的養分。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but contains significant issues: two English words ('practise' and 'absolutely') are left untranslated, breaking fluency; 'resignation' is rendered as '放棄' (abandonment) rather than the more nuanced philosophical concept; and the poetic rhythm of Thoreau's original is lost. The final phrase 'suck out all the marrow' becomes overly literal rather than metaphorically evocative.

results.translated_text: 請稱我為以實馬利。幾年前——具體年數無關緊要——我囊中羞澀，既無足夠金錢，也無特別事項足以吸引我留在陸地，我便決定出海遊歷一番，去看看那水域之地。這是我驅散鬱悶、調節氣血的方法。每當我發現自己神情頹喪、嘴角下沉；每當我的靈魂中陰雨綿綿，似十一月般潮濕陰冷，我就認為該立即出海，不能再拖了。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the meaning and archaic tone effectively, with good preservation of Melville's philosophical musings and metaphorical language. Minor fluency issues arise from slightly awkward phrasing in places (e.g., '水域之地' for 'watery part'), but the overall literary quality and emotional resonance remain strong.

results.translated_text: 世界中で認められている事実であるが、豊かな財産を備えた独身男は必ず妻を求める。その男の感情や見解がどれほど周囲の町に初めに現れる際には知られていなくても、この真実は周囲の家族たちの心に深く根付いているため、彼はいずれかの娘たちの正真正銘の財産として扱われることになる。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but loses some of Austen's ironic bite and elegant simplicity. The phrasing is somewhat awkward (e.g., '正真正銘の財産' is overly literal for 'rightful property') and the opening lacks the aphoristic punch of the original; the irony is present but muted rather than sharp.

results.translated_text: スタジオにはバラの豊かな香りが満ちており、軽やかな夏の風が庭の木々を揺らすとき、開け放された窓からはラビットの重厚な香りや、ピンクの花を咲かせる棘の繊細な香りが運ばれてきた。彼が座っているペルシャ風の鞍袋のダイヴァンの角から、ラバノムの蜜の甘い蜜色の花びらのきらめきをわずかに捉えられるのだった。ロード・ヘンリー・ワットンは、いつものように無数のたばこを吸いながらそのようにしていた。

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors including mistranslation of 'lilac' as 'ラビット' (rabbit), awkward sentence restructuring that disrupts the flowing aesthetic prose, and loss of the sensory immersion central to Wilde's style. The original's elegant construction is fragmented into disjointed clauses that diminish the aesthetic impact.

results.translated_text:
「アフガニスタンにいたことはお分かりですね。」
「どうやってそんなことが分かったの？」私は驚きながら尋ねた。
「気にするな」と彼は独り言のように笑いながら言った。「では今度はヘモグロビンについての話だ。きっとあなたは私のこの発見の意義を理解しているだろう？」
「化学的には間違いありませんね」と私は答え、「しかし実用面では——」
「ええ、男よ、これは何年かに一度あるかないかの、最も実用的な法医学的発見だ。あなたはそれが血痕の絶対的な検査法を与えることを理解しないのか？」

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning and dialogue structure but has some awkward phrasings and tone inconsistencies. The opening line reverses the speaker attribution, and some expressions like 'ええ、男よ' feel unnatural for Holmes's character, slightly diminishing both fluency and the Victorian-era formal style of the original.

results.translated_text: 私は森へ行ったのは、堅実に生きたいからだ。生きる上で必要な事実だけに向き合い、それによって何を教えてくれるかを学べるかどうか試してみたかった。そして、死ぬときになって、まだ生きていなかったことに気づくのを避けるためだった。生きるものが人生ではない、生きることはとても大切だから、諸事情を諦めるのは、それが本当に必要だった場合以外は望んでいなかった。私は深く生き、生命のすべてを吸い尽くすことを望んでいた。

scores.feedback: The translation captures the general philosophical intent but contains significant issues: awkward phrasing ('堅実に生きたい' misses 'deliberately'), unclear constructions ('生きるものが人生ではない' is confusing), and the poetic rhythm of Thoreau's prose is lost. Key phrases like 'front only the essential facts' and 'suck out all the marrow' lack the vivid precision of the original.

results.translated_text: 私はイサマエルと呼びなさい。いくつかの年前、正確にはどのくらいかは気にしなくていいが、私の財布にはお金がわずかしかなく、陸の上で私を特別に興味させるようなことは何もなかった。だから、私はちょっと航海をして、海の向こうの世界を見たいと思ったのだ。これは私の脾を癒し、血の巡りを整えるための方法だ。私が口元が暗くなり、心の中に湿った、曇った11月の気配を感じるとき、すぐにでも海へ出航すべきだと考えるのだ。

scores.feedback: The translation captures basic meaning but loses significant nuance and archaic tone. Phrases like 'Call me Ishmael' become awkwardly imperative ('呼びなさい'), and the philosophical meditation on melancholy is reduced to more literal, mechanical language. The poetic flow and 19th-century narrative voice are substantially diminished.

results.translated_text: 모든 사람에게 공히 인정되는 진실은, 부유한 재산을 가진 독신 남자가 반드시 아내를 원한다고 한다. 이 남자가 처음으로 어떤 지역에 발을 붙일 때 그의 감정이나 생각이 얼마나 알려져 있든 간에, 주변 가족들의 마음속에 이 진실이 너무나 잘 자리 잡고 있어 그를 그들의 딸 중 한 명의 합당한 상속물로 간주하게 된다.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the core meaning and ironic social commentary of Austen's opening, though '상속물' (inheritance/property) is slightly less elegant than the original's 'property' for capturing the objectification. The fluency is good but occasionally stiff in phrasing, and the distinctive Austenian ironic tone is somewhat muted compared to the original's sardonic wit.

results.translated_text: 작업실은 장미의 풍부한 향으로 가득했고, 여름 바람이 정원의 나무 사이를 스치고 지나갈 때마다, 열린 문을 통해 라일리안의 중한 향이 흘러들거나, 핑크색 꽃이 피는 바리스타의 더 섬세한 향이 느껴졌다. 페르시아 양탄자 위에 있는 divan의 구석에서, 그는 자신만의 습관대로 수많은 담배를 피우며, 꿀처럼 달콤하고 꿀색의 꽃망울이 반짝이는 것을 정확히 잡을 수 있었다.

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors including mistranslations ('바리스타' for thorn, 'divan' left untranslated), awkward phrasing, and loss of aesthetic sensibility. The poetic flow and Wilde's refined sensory descriptions are substantially diminished, with grammatical issues and unclear constructions that obscure the original meaning.

results.translated_text: 아프가니스탄에去过었군요, 알아요." "어떻게 그런 것을 알고 계셨어요?" 놀라서 물었습니다. "아니야,"라고 웃으며 말했습니다. "지금은 혈색소에 대해 이야기하고 있어요. 내 발견의 중요성을 분명히 알아보시겠어요?" "화학적으로는 흥미로운데,"라고 저는 대답했습니다, "하지만 실제로는—" "아, 그런가요. 수년 만에 가장 실용적인 법의학적 발견이죠. 피 얼룩을 검출할 수 있는 불가능한 시험법을 제공하니까요, 알지 않나요?"

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors including mixed language (Chinese character 去过), inconsistent formality levels, and meaning distortions (e.g., 'infallible test' incorrectly rendered as '불가능한 시험법' meaning 'impossible test'). The dialogue lacks the natural flow and Victorian-era tone of the original.

results.translated_text: 나는 숲으로 가서 진정한 삶을 살아보고자 했다. 삶의 본질적인 진실만을 마주하게 되고, 그것이 가르쳐주는 것을 배우고자 했다. 그리고 죽을 때까지 삶을 살지 못했다는 것을 깨닫지 않기를 원했다. 삶이 너무 소중해서 삶이 아닌 것을 살고 싶지 않았고, 절대적으로 필요한 경우가 아니면 포기하는 것도 원치 않았다. 나는 깊이 살아야 하고, 삶의 모든 진한 맛을 빨아내고 싶었다.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of Thoreau's core meaning but loses some philosophical nuance and rhetorical force. The sentence structure becomes more fragmented and less flowing than the original's deliberate, interconnected clauses, and key phrases like 'suck out all the marrow' (빨아내다) feel slightly diminished in their visceral power compared to the source.

results.translated_text: 제 이름은 이시메일입니다. 몇 년 전, 정확히 몇 년 전인지 중요하지 않게, 지갑에 돈이 거의 없고 육지에서 특별히 관심을 주는 일이 없어서, 나는 바다를 여행하며 세계의 물 많은 부분을 보고 싶다고 생각했습니다. 이는 나의 기분 나쁜 감정을 달래고 혈액 순환을 조절하는 방법입니다. 언제나 내가 입가가 어두워지거나, 영혼이 습하고 흐릿한 11월이 되면, 나는 바다로 떠나야 할 시기가 다가오면 빨리 떠나야 한다고 생각합니다.

scores.feedback: The translation captures basic meaning but loses significant nuance and literary elegance. Key issues include awkward phrasing ('제 이름은 이시메일입니다' is too formal), mistranslation of 'spleen' as '기분 나쁜 감정' (loses philosophical depth), and failure to preserve Melville's archaic, contemplative tone. The final sentence becomes convoluted and loses the original's rhythmic flow.

results.translated_text: Đây là một sự thật được công nhận rộng rãi, rằng một người đàn ông độc thân có tài sản dồi dào chắc chắn phải tìm kiếm một người vợ. Dù những cảm xúc hay quan điểm của người đàn ông này có thể còn xa lạ khi anh ta lần đầu đến một khu vực nào đó, sự thật này vẫn được ghi nhớ rõ ràng trong tâm trí của các gia đình lân cận đến mức họ coi anh ta là tài sản chính đáng của một trong số những người con gái nào đó của họ.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning and ironic premise accurately, but the Vietnamese phrasing is somewhat awkward and loses the elegant, flowing rhythm of Austen's original prose. The ironic tone is partially preserved but diluted by overly literal construction and verbose phrasing that doesn't feel natural to Vietnamese readers.

results.translated_text: Phòng làm việc ngập tràn mùi hương đậm đà của hoa hồng, và khi gió hè nhẹ thổi qua những hàng cây trong vườn, hương thơm đậm đà của hoa nhài hay hương thơm tinh tế hơn của loài gai hồng sẽ lan vào qua cửa sổ mở. Từ góc chiếc divan đặt trên những chiếc túi địu Ba Tư, nơi Lord Henry Wotton đang nằm, hút liên tục những điếu thuốc như thói quen của mình, ông có thể bắt gặp ánh sáng lấp lánh của những bông hoa laburnum vàng ngọt như mật ong.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most key elements and sensory details but contains some inaccuracies: 'phòng làm việc' (office/workspace) misses the artistic connotation of 'studio,' 'hoa nhài' (jasmine) doesn't match 'lilac,' and 'cửa sổ' (window) should be 'cửa' (door). The Vietnamese reads somewhat awkwardly with overly long sentences and loses some of Wilde's aesthetic elegance and flowing rhythm.

results.translated_text: "Bạn đã từng đến Afghanistan, tôi nhận ra." "Làm sao anh biết được điều đó?" Tôi hỏi với sự ngạc nhiên. "Không cần quan tâm," anh ta nói, cười khẩy. "Vấn đề hiện tại là về hemoglobin. Không nghi ngờ gì, anh thấy ý nghĩa của khám phá này của tôi sao?" "Không nghi ngờ gì, nó thú vị về mặt hóa học," tôi đáp, "nhưng về mặt thực tiễn—" "Ồ, người ơi, đây là khám phá pháp y thực tiễn nhất trong nhiều năm. Anh không thấy rằng nó cho phép chúng ta kiểm tra máu một cách chắc chắn không?"

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but has awkward phrasing and redundancy issues ("Không nghi ngờ gì" appears twice). The dialogue feels stilted and less natural than the original, with some grammatical constructions that don't flow smoothly in Vietnamese, affecting both fluency and the sharp, witty tone of Holmes's character.

results.translated_text: Tôi đến rừng để sống một cuộc đời có suy nghĩ, chỉ đối mặt với những sự thật cốt lõi của cuộc sống, và xem liệu có thể học hỏi điều gì mà cuộc sống muốn dạy tôi hay không, chứ không phải khi tôi đến tuổi chết rồi mới phát hiện ra mình chưa từng sống thật. Tôi không muốn sống những điều không phải là sống, bởi sống là một điều quý giá; tôi cũng không muốn thực hành sự từ bỏ, trừ khi nó thực sự cần thiết. Tôi muốn sống sâu sắc và hút hết tinh chất của cuộc đời.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core philosophical meaning and maintains Thoreau's deliberate, introspective tone well. Minor issues include slightly awkward phrasing in places ('đến tuổi chết' is less elegant than alternatives, 'hút hết tinh chất' is somewhat colloquial for the formal register) and the rhythm of the original's parallel structures is slightly diminished, though the essential ideas and emotional weight are preserved.

results.translated_text: Hãy gọi tôi là Ishmael. Một vài năm trước, dù không biết chính xác bao lâu, với ít tiền trong túi và không có điều gì đặc biệt để quan tâm trên cạn, tôi nghĩ rằng tôi sẽ đi biển một chuyến để xem phần thế giới đầy nước đó. Đó là cách tôi xua tan nỗi buồn và điều hòa tuần hoàn máu. Mỗi khi tôi cảm thấy mình trở nên nghiêm khắc trên môi; mỗi khi tâm hồn tôi như tháng Mười một ẩm ướt, mưa phù du, tôi cho rằng đó là lúc thích hợp nhất để ra biển ngay lập tức.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning but loses some nuance in the archaic tone and philosophical weight of the original. Phrases like 'driving off the spleen' become more literal ('xua tan nỗi buồn'), and the poetic metaphor of 'a damp, drizzly November in my soul' is awkwardly restructured, diminishing its lyrical quality and the original's introspective melancholy.

results.translated_text: ความจริงที่ได้รับการยอมรับอย่างแพร่หลายคือ ชายคนเดียวที่มีทรัพย์สินดี จะต้องต้องการภรรยาแน่นอน ไม่ว่าความรู้สึกหรือความคิดเห็นของเขาจะเป็นอย่างไรก็ตาม ความจริงนี้มีอยู่ในใจของครอบครัวรอบข้างอย่างแน่นอน จนถูกมองว่าเป็นทรัพย์สินที่สมควรเป็นของลูกสาวคนใดคนหนึ่งของพวกเขา

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but loses some of Austen's ironic subtlety and formal elegance. The phrase structure becomes somewhat awkward in Thai, and the famous opening's satirical tone is diminished by more literal rendering rather than capturing the wry social commentary.

results.translated_text: ห้องทำงานเต็มไปด้วยกลิ่นหอมของดอกกุหลาบอันเข้มข้น เมื่อลมฤดูร้อนอันอ่อนโยนพัดผ่านต้นไม้ในสวน กลิ่นหอม浓郁ของดอกลาลิลาก็ลอยเข้ามาผ่านประตูที่เปิดอยู่ หรือกลิ่นหอมอ่อนโยนของดอกทิวลิปสีชมพูที่บาน ขณะที่เขาพิงอยู่บนเตียงพุ้งพาร์ซีที่วางอยู่มุมห้อง กำลังสูบบุหรี่ตามนิสัยของเขาอย่างไม่ขาดสาย เขาก็สามารถมองเห็นแสงสะท้อนของดอกไม้ที่มีกลิ่นหอมหวานเหมือนน้ำผึ้งและสีน้ำตาลเข้มของต้นลาลิลาได้

scores.feedback: The translation captures basic meaning but contains significant errors: 'lilac' is mistranslated as 'ลาลิลาก' (unclear term), 'pink-flowering thorn' becomes 'ทิวลิปสีชมพู' (tulips, incorrect flower), and 'laburnum' is also rendered as 'ลาลิลาก'. The aesthetic sensory richness of Wilde's prose is diminished by awkward phrasing and botanical inaccuracies that undermine the passage's delicate imagery.

results.translated_text:
คุณเคยไปอัฟกานิสถานมาแล้วนะ
"คุณรู้ได้อย่างไรว่าอย่างนั้น" ฉันถามด้วยความประหลาดใจ
"ไม่ต้องกังวล" เขาพูดพร้อมหัวเราะเบาๆ "คำถามตอนนี้คือฮีโมโกลบิน คุณคงเห็นความสำคัญของข้าพเจ้าในการค้นพบนี้อย่างแน่นอน"
"มันน่าสนใจแน่นอนในแง่เคมี" ฉันตอบ "แต่ในแง่การใช้งานจริง—"
"เห็นไหม มนุษย์ มันคือการค้นพบที่มีประโยชน์ที่สุดในด้านการแพทย์และกฎหมายมาหลายปีแล้ว คุณไม่เห็นหรือว่ามันให้การทดสอบที่ไม่มีความผิดพลาดสำหรับรอยเลือด?"

scores.feedback: The translation captures most key meanings and maintains the dialogue structure, but has notable issues: 'ข้าพเจ้า' (formal first-person) is inappropriate for Holmes's character, the opening lacks proper dialogue attribution, and some phrasing feels awkward (e.g., 'คุณคงเห็นความสำคัญของข้าพเจ้าในการค้นพบนี้' misattributes the discovery). The tone and Victorian-era formality are partially lost in the Thai rendering.

results.translated_text: ฉันเดินทางไปอยู่ป่าเพราะฉันต้องการใช้ชีวิตอย่างมีความตั้งใจ เผชิญหน้าเพียงกับความจริงที่สำคัญของชีวิต และตรวจสอบว่าจะได้เรียนรู้อะไรจากมันหรือไม่ ไม่ใช่เมื่อถึงวันต้องจากไป แล้วพบว่าฉันยังไม่ได้ใช้ชีวิตอย่างแท้จริง ฉันไม่ต้องการใช้ชีวิตที่ไม่ใช่ชีวิต ที่ชีวิตมีค่ามาก หรือไม่ต้องการฝึกฝนการยอมรับความเสื่อมถอย ยกเว้นเมื่อจำเป็นอย่างยิ่ง ฉันต้องการใช้ชีวิตอย่างลึกซึ้ง และดูดซับทุกสิ่งที่มีค่าที่สุดของชีวิต

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of Thoreau's philosophical meaning but loses some nuance and elegance. The phrase 'ดูดซับทุกสิ่งที่มีค่าที่สุด' (absorb everything most valuable) weakens the visceral power of 'suck out all the marrow,' and the sentence structure becomes somewhat awkward in Thai, particularly in the middle section about resignation, which reads less fluidly than the original's rhythmic prose.

results.translated_text: เรียกผมว่าอิสแมล หลายปีก่อน—ไม่สำคัญว่าจะนานแค่ไหน—ผมมีเงินในกระเป๋าน้อยหรือไม่มีเลย และไม่มีสิ่งใดที่น่าสนใจผมบนบก จึงคิดว่าจะไปเที่ยวเรือเล็กน้อยและมองโลกที่เป็นทะเลดูบ้าง นี่คือวิธีที่ผมใช้ในการกำจัดความเศร้าหมองและควบคุมการไหลเวียนของเลือด ทุกครั้งที่ผมรู้สึกหนักใจและปากดูนิ่ง หรือทุกครั้งที่อากาศเปียกชื้นและฝนตกปรอยๆ ในจิตใจ ผมก็คิดว่าเป็นเวลาที่เหมาะสมที่สุดที่จะออกทะเลโดยเร็วที่สุด

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning but loses some nuance in Melville's philosophical tone and metaphorical depth. While generally understandable, the Thai phrasing feels somewhat stilted and fails to fully convey the archaic, introspective literary voice of the original, particularly in the spleen/melancholy passages.

results.translated_text: एक अच्छी संपत्ति के साथ एक व्यक्ति के लिए एक शादी के लिए आवश्यकता होती है, यह एक सार्वत्रिक रूप से मान्यता है। हालांकि इस व्यक्ति के भावनाओं या दृष्टिकोणों की जानकारी उनके आसपास के क्षेत्र में पहली बार प्रवेश करते ही बहुत कम हो सकती है, लेकिन इस ज्ञान की ताकत इतनी गहरी होती है कि आसपास के परिवारों के मन में इस विचार को इतनी गहराई से स्थापित कर दिया गया है कि वह किसी अथवा अन्य अपनी बेटियों के अधिकार के वस्तु के रूप में माना जाता है।

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic meaning but loses the elegant irony and satirical tone of Austen's opening. The sentence structure is convoluted and awkward in Hindi, with phrases like 'शादी के लिए आवश्यकता होती है' (need for marriage) inverting the original's wit. The critical opening irony—that society assumes a wealthy man must want a wife—becomes muddled rather than sharp and pointed.

results.translated_text: कार्यशाला में लाल रोज़ के गहरे गंध की भरा हुआ था, और जब गर्म गर्मी के बर्फीले हवा बगीचे के पेड़ों के बीच उतरती थी, तो खुले द्वार से लिली के गहरे गंध या पिंक फूल वाले छोटे तन के नरम गंध आते थे। पर्शियाई साडल बैगों के कोने में लेटे हुए, जैसा कि उसकी आदत थी, अपार संख्या में सिगरेट धुप करते हुए, लॉर्ड हेनरी वॉटन बर्फीले रंग और मधुर रंग के लैबर्नम के फूलों की चमक के टुकड़े देख सकते थे।

scores.feedback: The translation contains severe errors including nonsensical phrases ('warm summer ice wind'), incorrect botanical terms ('pink flowering small body'), grammatical mistakes, and complete misrepresentation of the aesthetic sensory experience. The poetic elegance and careful sensory descriptions of Wilde's original are entirely lost.

results.translated_text: "आप अफगानिस्तान में रहे हैं, मुझे लगता है।" "आप कैसे जानते हैं यह बात?" मैं आश्चर्य से पूछता हूँ। "अब बात नहीं करो," वह खुद को चुमके लेते हुए कहता है। "अब बात हीमोग्लोबिन के बारे में है। आप निश्चित रूप से इस खोज के महत्व को देखते हैं?" "रासायनिक रूप से निश्चित रूप से यह दिलचस्प है," मैं जवाब देता हूँ, "लेकिन कार्यात्मक रूप से—" "हाँ, दोस्त, यह सालों के लिए सबसे कार्यात्मक मेडिको-कानूनी खोज है। आप नहीं देखते कि यह हमें रक्त दाग के लिए अक्षम जांच प्रदान करती है?"

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic meaning but contains significant errors: 'अब बात नहीं करो' misrepresents 'Never mind' (should be 'कोई बात नहीं'), 'अक्षम जांच' incorrectly means 'incompetent test' instead of 'infallible test' (should be 'अचूक जांच'), and the dialogue feels stilted with awkward phrasing that doesn't match the original's natural Victorian conversational tone.

results.translated_text: मैं जंगल में गया क्योंकि मैं जीवन को सावधानी से बिताना चाहता था, जीवन के आवश्यक तथ्यों के सामने खड़ा रहना चाहता था और देखना चाहता था कि क्या मैं जीवन से शिक्षा ले सकता हूं, और जब मैं मरने वाला होऊं तो खोजना नहीं चाहिए कि मैंने जीवन नहीं बिताया है। मैं ऐसा जीवन नहीं बिताना चाहता जो वास्तविक जीवन नहीं हो। जीवन इतना दिलचस्प है कि मैं ऐसा जीवन नहीं बिताना चाहता जो वास्तविक नहीं हो। मैं उत्साह छोड़ना नहीं चाहता अपवाद के अतिरिक्त। मैं जीवन के गहरे जीवन बिताना चाहता था और जीवन के सभी तेल निकालना चाहता था।

scores.feedback: The translation loses significant meaning and philosophical depth through awkward phrasing, repetition, and mistranslations (e.g., 'suck out all the marrow' becomes 'extract all the oil'), while the prose becomes choppy and unnatural rather than maintaining Thoreau's meditative eloquence.

results.translated_text: मुझे इश्माएल कहें। कई साल पहले—कितने समय बीत गए हैं वह बहुत बात नहीं है—मेरे बोरे में थोड़ा सा या कोई भी पैसा न हो, और जमीन पर मेरे लिए कोई खास बात न हो, मुझे लगा कि मैं थोड़े समय के लिए बाहर नाव चलाकर दुनिया के जल भरे हिस्से को देखने के लिए जाऊंगा। यह मेरा एक तरीका है मांसपेशियों के तनाव को कम करना और रक्त प्रवाह को नियंत्रित करना। जब मुझे अपने मुँह के बारे में गम बन रहा हो, तब मैं जल्दी से समुद्र जाने के लिए उत्सुक हो जाता हूँ, क्योंकि तब मेरे आत्मा में एक गंम गरजती नवंबर की बरसात होती है।

scores.feedback: The translation loses significant meaning and nuance from the original. Key issues include mistranslation of 'spleen' as 'मांसपेशियों के तनाव' (muscle tension), awkward phrasing throughout, and failure to capture Melville's introspective, philosophical tone. The archaic literary style is not preserved, and several passages become confusing or grammatically awkward in Hindi.

results.translated_text: এটি সারাদুনিয়া স্বীকৃত একটি সত্য, যে কোনও সম্প্রদায় সম্পত্তি সম্পন্ন একক পুরুষ অবশ্যই একজন স্ত্রী চাই। যে কোনও পরিচিতি ছাড়া এমন একজন পুরুষের ভাবনা বা মত কোনও এলাকায় প্রথমবার প্রবেশ করার সময় কতটা অপরিচিত হোক না কেন, এই সত্য সারাদিন স্থায়ী হওয়ায় তার প্রতি স্থানীয় পরিবারগুলির মনে এতটাই স্থায়ী যে তিনি তাদের কোনও কন্যার স্বত্বের অধিকারী হিসাবে বিবেচিত হন।

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic meaning but loses Austen's signature irony and elegant simplicity through awkward phrasing and grammatical issues. Key problems include 'সম্প্রদায় সম্পত্তি' (community property) misrepresenting 'good fortune,' redundant phrases like 'সারাদিন স্থায়ী হওয়ায়,' and overly complex sentence construction that obscures the original's witty social commentary.

results.translated_text: স্টুডিওটিতে রোজ গাছের মূল্যবান গন্ধ ছিল। গ্রীষ্মের নরম বাতাস গার্ডেনের গাছগুলির মধ্যে ঘুরে বেড়ালে খুলা দরজার মধ্যে লিলাকের ভারী গন্ধ বা রঙিন ফুল সুন্দর থোর্নের সুকঠিন গন্ধ আসত। পারসিয়ান সাডেল ব্যাগ বিশিষ্ট ডিভানের কোণে যেখানে তিনি বসে ছিলেন, তাঁর আচার ছিল অসংখ্য সিগারেট খাওয়া, লর্ড হেনরি ওটন মধুর সুগন্ধি এবং মধুর রংয়ের ফুলের আলো দেখতে পান।

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic meaning but loses significant sensory nuance and aesthetic precision. Key issues include awkward phrasing ('রঙিন ফুল সুন্দর থোর্নের সুকঠিন গন্ধ'), grammatical errors ('বসে ছিলেন' should reflect reclining), and failure to preserve Wilde's lyrical flow and the delicate distinction between scents that defines the passage's aestheticism.

results.translated_text: আপনি আফগানিস্তানে ছিলেন, আমি বুঝতে পারি। "আমি কিভাবে জানতে পারলাম তা বলুন?" আমি আশ্চর্যে করে জিজ্ঞাসা করলাম। "তা বলুন না," তিনি নিজের হাসি করে বললেন। "এখন প্রশ্ন হল হিমোগ্লোবিন নিয়ে। আপনি নিশ্চয় আমার এই আবিষ্কারের গুরুত্ব দেখতে পাচ্ছেন?" "এটি রসায়নে আগ্রহের বিষয়, নিশ্চয়ই," আমি উত্তর দিলাম, "কিন্তু প্রায় করে—" "হে ব্যক্তি, এটি বছরের জন্য সবচেয়ে প্রায় চিকিৎসা-আইনী আবিষ্কার। আপনি দেখতে পাচ্ছেন না কি এটি রক্ত ধারণ করার জন্য অপরাজয় পরীক্ষা দেয়?"

scores.feedback: The translation contains severe errors including mistranslations ('প্রায় করে' for 'practically'), grammatical mistakes, and nonsensical phrases ('রক্ত ধারণ করার জন্য' for 'blood stains'). The dialogue structure is confused and the meaning is significantly distorted, making it difficult to understand the original intent.

results.translated_text: আমি জঙ্গলে যাই কারণ আমি পরিষ্কারভাবে জীবনযাপন করতে চাই, জীবনের কেবল অপরিহার্য তথ্যগুলি দেখতে চাই এবং জানতে চাই কি আমাকে শেখায়, এবং যখন আমি মৃত্যুর সময় আসি তখন আমি আমার জীবন কেবলমাত্র জীবন ছিল কিনা জানতে চাই। আমি জীবন যে কিছু নয় সেটি জীবন হিসেবে জীবনযাপন করতে চাইনি, কারণ জীবন এতটাই মূল্যবান; আর আমি অবনমিত হওয়া প্রায় কখনও করতে চাইনি, যদি এটি অত্যাবশ্যক না হয়। আমি ভারীভাবে জীবনযাপন করতে চাই এবং জীবনের সব মার্মর তুলে নিতে চাই।

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core philosophical meaning but suffers from awkward phrasing, grammatical issues, and loss of Thoreau's eloquent rhythm. Phrases like 'জীবন যে কিছু নয় সেটি জীবন হিসেবে জীবনযাপন করতে চাইনি' are convoluted, and the poetic force of 'suck out all the marrow' is weakened by 'মার্মর তুলে নিতে চাই,' diminishing the text's philosophical power and natural flow.

results.translated_text: আমাকে ইসমাইল বলুন। কিছু বছর আগে—যে সময় হোক না কেন—আমার পোকেটে কিছু বা কোনো টাকা না থাকায় এবং মূল্যবান কিছু না থাকায়, আমি কিছুক্ষণ সাঁতার করে দুনিয়ার জলময় অংশ দেখতে চাইলাম। এটি আমার একটি পদ্ধতি হল স্প্লেন দূর করতে এবং প্রবাহ নিয়ন্ত্রণ করতে। যখন আমি মুখে কালো হয়ে আসার সময় বুঝি, যখন আমার মনে কালো, মেঘালো নভেম্বর হয়ে আসার সময়, তখন আমি জানি যে আমি সামান্য কিছু জলে যেতে চাই।

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors: 'sail' is incorrectly rendered as 'swim' (সাঁতার করে), 'spleen' is left untranslated/mishandled, and 'circulation' is vaguely translated as 'flow.' The prose is awkward and unnatural in Bengali, failing to capture Melville's philosophical tone and archaic literary style, resulting in a translation that is both inaccurate and difficult to read.

results.translated_text: தொடர்ந்து அறியப்படும் உண்மை ஒரு பெரிய செல்லமுள்ள தனியார் மனைவி தேவைப்படுவது தேவைப்படும். இந்த மனிதனின் உணர்வுகள் அல்லது கருத்துகள் எவ்வளவு குறைவாக இருந்தாலும், இந்த உண்மை சுற்றுப்புற குடும்பங்களின் மனங்களில் மிகவும் நிலைநிற்கிறது, எனவே அவர் அவர்களின் மகள்களின் சொர்க்கத்தின் உரிமையானவராக கருதப்படுகிறார்.

scores.feedback: The translation significantly distorts the original meaning and tone. Key issues include: 'செல்லமுள்ள' (beloved/cherished) misrepresents 'good fortune' (wealth), the opening sentence becomes grammatically incoherent, and critical ironic elements are lost. The famous opening's biting social commentary is completely undermined, and 'சொர்க்கத்தின் உரிமையானவராக' (rightful property of heaven) is a severe mistranslation of 'rightful property of some one or other of their daughters.'

results.translated_text: அரங்கம் மலர்களின் மிக உயர்ந்த மணத்தில் நிரம்பியிருந்தது. கூட்டம் பூக்களின் மணம் மேல் காற்று விசிரிக்கும் போது, கீழ் காட்டில் மரங்களின் இடையில் இருந்து வரும் லிலாக்களின் மிக கடுமையான மணம் அல்லது மேல் பூக்களின் மென்மையான மணம் திறந்த வாயில் வருகின்றது. அவர் பெருமையான பெரும்பாலான கைத்தடி பைகளில் அமர்ந்திருந்த டிவானின் மூலையிலிருந்து, அவரது வழக்கமான சுவாசத்தில் பல சிக்கல்களை பற்றி அவர் செய்து கொண்டிருந்தார், அப்போது அவர் செருக்கை போல் சிலிர்த்து பார்த்தார்.

scores.feedback: The translation contains severe accuracy errors, including mistranslations of key terms ("கூட்டம் பூக்களின் மணம்" for roses, "வாயில்" for door, "சுவாசத்தில்" for smoking), completely garbled syntax, and loss of the aesthetic sensory richness central to Wilde's prose. The Tamil text is largely incoherent and fails to convey the original's elegant, flowing description.

results.translated_text: "ஆபகானிஸ்தானில் இருந்து வந்திருக்கிறார், என்னை உணர்கிறேன்." "ஏன் தெரியும்?" சம்மானம் என்று கேட்டேன். "அதை தவிர்க்கவும்," என்று அவர் தன்னிலையில் சிரித்தார். "இப்போது கேள்வி ஹீமோக்ளோபின் பற்றியது. இந்த கண்டுபிடிப்பின் பொருட்செலவு உணர்கிறீர்களா?" "இது கேமிக்கலில் சுவாசமாக உள்ளது, மறுபடியும் நான் உண்மையாக நீங்கள் இதன் பொருட்செலவு உணர்கிறீர்களா?" என்று கூறினேன், "ஆனால் வேறு பக்கம்—" "ஐயா, இது பல ஆண்டுகளுக்கு பின் மிகவும் பொருட்செலவு மெடிகோ-நீதிமன்றம் கண்டுபிடிப்பு. இது நமக்கு ரத்த பிரிண்டுகளுக்கு தவறாமல் சோதனை தருகிறது என்று காணவில்லையா?"

scores.feedback: This translation is severely flawed with fundamental errors: incorrect pronoun usage (first person instead of second), nonsensical phrases like 'பொருட்செலவு' (expense/cost) used repeatedly where 'significance' is meant, garbled sentence structure making dialogue incomprehensible, and complete loss of the original meaning and tone. The translation appears machine-generated with minimal post-editing and fails to convey even basic meaning.

results.translated_text: நான் காட்டுக்குச் சென்றேன், ஏனெனில் நான் தீர்மானமாக வாழ விரும்பினேன், வாழ்வின் அடிப்படை உண்மைகளை மட்டுமே முன்னிலையில் காண விரும்பினேன், மற்றும் நான் அதிலிருந்து என்னை கற்றுக் கொள்ள முடியுமா என்று அறிய விரும்பினேன், மற்றும் நான் மரணம் வந்து தான் என்னை வாழ்ந்ததாக கண்டு பிடிக்க விரும்பவில்லை. நான் பொய்யான வாழ்வை வாழ விரும்பவில்லை, வாழ்வு இப்போது அளவற்ற மதிப்பு வாய்ந்தது; மேலும் நான் துறைமுகமாக துறந்து வாழ விரும்பவில்லை, அது முழுவதும் தேவை இல்லை என்பது தான். நான் வாழ்வின் ஆழத்தில் வாழ விரும்பினேன் மற்றும் வாழ்வின் தேனை முழுமையாக உருவாக்க விரும்பினேன்.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the general meaning but contains several errors: 'அதிலிருந்து என்னை' is awkward phrasing, 'மரணம் வந்து தான்' mishandles the conditional structure, 'துறைமுகமாக' (harbor/port) is incorrect for resignation, and 'தேனை' (honey) is a mistranslation of 'marrow.' The philosophical depth and Thoreau's deliberate, meditative tone are diminished by awkward constructions and word choices.

results.translated_text: என்னை இஸ்மாயில் என்று அழைக்கவும். சில ஆண்டுகளுக்கு முன்னர் - துலக்கும் அளவில் எவ்வளவு நேரம் என்பதை கவனிக்க வேண்டாம் - என் கைவசம் குறைந்த பணம் இல்லை, மேலும் கரையில் எனக்கு சில குறிப்பிடத்தக்க விஷயங்கள் இல்லை, எனவே நான் சற்றே செல்ல முடியும் மற்றும் கரையில் உள்ள நீர்மையான பகுதியை பார்க்க முன்வந்தேன். இது என் தீர்த்து விடுவதும் மற்றும் சirkulationஐ மேலும் சீராக்குவதுமாக இருக்கும். நான் தீவிரமாக பேசும் போது என் முகம் துருத்திக் காட்டும் போது; என் மனதில் நீராவியான குளிர்நிலையில் இருக்கிறேன் என்பதை உணர்ந்தால், என்னை விரைவாக கடலுக்கு செல்ல வேண்டும் என்று நான் நினைக்கிறேன்.

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant meaning distortions and errors: 'spleen' is mistranslated as 'circulation regulation,' metaphorical language is lost or corrupted, and phrases like 'growing grim about the mouth' become nonsensical ('face protrudes'). The archaic literary tone is completely absent, replaced by awkward, unnatural Tamil that reads like a machine translation with grammatical inconsistencies and untranslated English words ('sirkulationai').

results.translated_text: Общепринятое убеждение, что одинокий мужчина, обладающий хорошим достатком, непременно ищет жену. Однако мало кто знает чувства или мнения такого человека при первом въезде в окрестность, этот факт так укоренился в сознании окружающих семей, что его считают законным достоянием какой-нибудь из их дочерей.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning but loses Austen's distinctive ironic voice and formal elegance. The opening lacks the authoritative, tongue-in-cheek tone of 'It is a truth universally acknowledged,' and 'законным достаянием' (lawful property) is less precise than the original's ironic suggestion of possession.

results.translated_text: Студия была наполнена плотным ароматом роз, и когда лёгкий летний ветер пробегал между деревьями сада, через открытую дверь доносился тяжёлый аромат лилии или более нежный аромат розовой колючки. С лежащего на диване с персидскими подушками, на котором он курил, как было его привычкой, неисчислимое количество сигарет, Лорд Генри Воттон мог лишь заметить блеск медово-сладких и медово-окрашенных цветов лабурана.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meanings but loses some aesthetic nuance—'розовой колючки' (pink thorn) is awkward, and the sensory flow is disrupted by awkward syntax in the final clause. The poetic, flowing quality of Wilde's prose is compromised by structural issues that make it read more like a translation than original Russian prose.

results.translated_text: — Вы были в Афганистане, — заметил он. — Как же вы узнали это? — воскликнул я, удивленно. — Не важно, — сказал он, смеясь про себя. — Теперь вопрос о гемоглобине. Не сомневаюсь, что вы понимаете значение моего открытия? — Это интересно с химической точки зрения, несомненно, — ответил я, — но с практической точки зрения — — Почему, черт возьми, это самое практичное медико-правовое открытие за долгие годы. Не видите ли вы, что это дает нам неуязвимый тест для кровавых пятен?

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but has notable fluency issues: awkward phrasing like 'удивленно' (adverb instead of adverbial phrase), 'черт возьми' (too colloquial for Holmes), and 'неуязвимый тест' (invulnerable test—incorrect word choice; should be 'безошибочный' or 'надежный'). The style loses Holmes's characteristic precision and Victorian formality, feeling more modern and less refined than the original.

results.translated_text: Я пошел в лес, потому что хотел жить осознанно, принимать во внимание только существенные факты жизни, и увидеть, смогу ли я узнать, что он может преподать, и не обнаружить, что я не прожил, когда придет время умирать. Я не хотел жить тем, что не является жизнью, так как жизнь так дорога; я не хотел практиковать отказ, если только это не было совершенно необходимо. Я хотел жить глубоко и выжать из жизни все сокровища.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning but loses some philosophical nuance and poetic rhythm. Phrases like 'принимать во внимание только существенные факты' (take into account only essential facts) is less precise than 'front only the essential facts,' and 'выжать из жизни все сокровища' (squeeze all treasures from life) weakens the visceral power of 'suck out all the marrow.' The prose reads somewhat stiffly and formal rather than maintaining Thoreau's contemplative yet direct voice.

results.translated_text: Позвольте меня назвать Измаелем. Несколько лет назад — не важно, сколько именно — имея немного или совсем не много денег в кармане, и ничего особенного, что могло бы заинтересовать меня на суше, я решил немного попутешествовать по морю и увидеть водяную часть мира. Это способ, которым я избавляюсь от селезенки и регулирую кровообращение. Когда я начинаю становиться суровым в лице; когда в моей душе наступает влажный, дождливый ноябрь, я считаю, что пришло время как можно скорее отправиться в море.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but has notable issues: 'Позвольте меня назвать' is awkward (should be 'Зовите меня' or 'Называйте меня'), 'водяную часть мира' is literal but unnatural, and 'селезенки' (spleen as organ) misses the idiomatic meaning of 'spleen' (melancholy). The archaic, contemplative tone is partially preserved but the awkward phrasing and literal renderings diminish both fluency and stylistic authenticity.

results.translated_text: Правда, яка загалом визнана, що чоловік, що володіє доброю фортуною, обов’язково має бути в пошуках дружини. Навіть якщо його думки чи погляди досить невідомі при першому вступі до сусідства, ця істина так добре встановлена в умах сусідських родин, що його вважають законною власністю якоїсь однієї з їхніх дочок.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning accurately but loses Austen's distinctive ironic tone and elegant rhythm. The phrasing is somewhat awkward and literal, particularly 'законною власністю' (lawful property) which, while technically correct, lacks the satirical bite of the original's social commentary.

results.translated_text: Студія була наповнена багато відтінків рози, а коли легкий літній вітер рухався серед дерев гаража, через відчинене двері доносилося важкий аромат лілій або більш тонкий аромат пінкових квітів. З кутика дивана, який був прикріплений перськими сідлами, на якому він лежав, куривши, як було його звичаєм, безліч цигарок, лорд Генрі Воттон міг лише відчути світло-медові й медово-кольорові квіти лабрануму.

scores.feedback: The translation contains multiple critical errors: 'багато відтінків рози' (many shades of rose) misses 'rich odour'; 'гаража' (garage) is completely wrong for 'garden'; 'дивана, який був прикріплений перськими сідлами' (divan attached with Persian saddles) distorts the meaning of 'divan of Persian saddle-bags'; and 'світло-медові' (light-honey) awkwardly translates 'honey-sweet.' The prose reads unnaturally and loses Wilde's aesthetic sensibility entirely.

results.translated_text: — Ви були в Афганістані, я це відчуваю, — сказав він. — Як же ви могли знати це? — здивувався я. — Не важливо, — сказав він, і зі сміхом. — Тепер питання про гемоглобін. Не сумніваюся, що ви бачите значення цього відкриття? — Відповів я: — Це цікаво з хімічної точки зору, не сумніваючись, але практично... — О, боже, це найбільш практичне медико-правове відкриття за роки. Не вибирається, що це надійний тест на кров'яні сліди?

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic meaning but contains several errors: 'я це відчуваю' misrepresents 'I perceive' (should be 'я це бачу' or similar), 'Не важливо' is awkward phrasing, 'Не сумніваюся' is incorrectly used twice, and 'Не вибирається' is nonsensical (should be 'Не видите' or 'Ви не бачите'). The dialogue flow and Victorian-era formality are also diminished.

results.translated_text: Я пішов у ліс, бо хотів жити впевнено, зіткнутися лише з основними фактами життя, і з'ясувати, чи зможу я навчитися, що він має вчити, і не з'ясувати, коли прийде час загинути, що я не жив. Я не хотів жити тим, що не є життям, бо життя так дороге; ніяк не хотів навчитися відмовлятися, окрім як у дуже необхідних випадках. Я хотів жити глибоко і випити всю сироватку життя.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the general meaning but contains significant issues: 'впевнено' (confidently) misses 'deliberately,' 'зіткнутися' (collide/confront) is awkward for 'front,' and the double 'з'ясувати' creates confusion. Most critically, 'сироватка' (whey/serum) is incorrect for 'marrow'—should be 'мозок' or 'суть.' The philosophical weight and eloquent rhythm of Thoreau's prose are diminished by awkward phrasing and word choices that don't align with the contemplative tone.

results.translated_text: Відомий я вам як Ішмавель. Невдовзі — не маючи точної дати, але деякі роки тому — маючи мало або навіть нічого не витрачено в моєму кошті, і нічого особливого, щоб зім’яти на березі, я вирішив залізти на корабель і подивитися на водяну частину світу. Це моя спосіб відганяти сльози і регулювати обіг. Якщо я почну відчувати себе засмученим і зі зіткненням на устах; якщо відчуваю, що в моєму серці вологий, сірий листопад, то розглядаю як відповідний час, щоб якнайшвидше вирушити в море.

scores.feedback: The translation contains numerous critical errors: 'Відомий я вам як' misrepresents 'Call me' (should be 'Назвіть мене'), grammatical mistakes throughout ('нічого не витрачено' is nonsensical), and severe mistranslations ('залізти на корабель' means 'climb onto a ship' rather than 'sail', 'маючи мало або навіть нічого не витрачено' is incomprehensible). The archaic, meditative tone of Melville's prose is completely lost, replaced by awkward, unnatural phrasing that obscures rather than conveys m

results.translated_text: إنها حقيقة معروفة بشكل عام، أن الرجل الأعزب الذي يمتلك ثروة جيدة، لا بد أنه يحتاج إلى زوجة. وبغض النظر عن مدى ضآلة ما يعرفه هذا الرجل من مشاعر أو آرائه عند دخوله منطقة جديدة، فإن هذه الحقيقة متجذرة بعمق في أذهان العائلات المحيطة به، فيُعتبر بمثابة الممتلك المشروع لابنة أو ابنة أخرى منهن.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the core meaning and maintains the ironic tone of Austen's opening, though some nuances are slightly softened. The Arabic reads naturally but occasionally feels more literal than the original's elegant irony, particularly in the final clause where 'rightful property' becomes 'legitimate possession' with diminished satirical bite.

results.translated_text: كانت الغرفة ممتلئة برائحة عطرية للورود، وفيما تهتز الرياح الصيفية الخفيفة بين أشجار الحديقة، كانت تدخل عبر الباب المفتوح رائحة قوية من الشوك، أو عطر ناعم من الشوك الذي يحمل الورود البرتقالية. من زاوية الديوان المصنوع من أكياس الجيوب البارثية الذي كان يرتاح عليه، ويتدخن كما اعتاده عدد لا يحصى من السجائر، كان يلتقط من الباب المفتوح لمعان الورود الحلوة والذهبيّة من شجرة اللورن.

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors including misidentifications of plants (pink-flowering thorn becomes orange roses, laburnum becomes 'laurel'), awkward phrasing ('saddle-bags' becomes 'pocket bags'), and confused syntax that obscures the original meaning. The sensory richness and aesthetic precision of Wilde's prose is substantially lost.

results.translated_text: لقد كنت في أفغانستان، أراه. "كيف عرفت ذلك؟" سألت بدهشة. "لا بأس" قال وهو يضحك لنفسه. "السؤال الآن هو عن الهيموجلوبين. لا شك أنك ترى أهمية هذا الاكتشاف؟" "بالتأكيد إنها مثيرة للاهتمام من الناحية الكيميائية" أجبت "لكن عمليًا—" "يا رجل، إنها أحدث اكتشاف طبي قانوني في السنين الأخيرة. لا ترى أن هذا يمنحنا اختبارًا غير قابل للتحايل لتحديد بقع الدم؟"

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core meaning and dialogue structure well, with accurate rendering of technical terms like 'hemoglobin' and 'medico-legal discovery.' However, there are minor issues: 'I perceive' becomes 'أراه' (I see him) rather than the more appropriate 'أدرك' (I perceive/deduce), and some Victorian formality is lost in the conversational tone, particularly in Holmes's characteristic deductive manner.

results.translated_text: ذهبت إلى الغابة لأنني أريد العيش بوعي، والتصدي فقط للحقائق الأساسية في الحياة، ورؤية ما إذا كنت أستطيع أن أتعلم ما يجب أن أتعلمه، ولا أن أكتشف当我 أموت أنني لم أعش. لم أريد العيش بما ليس حياة، فالحياة مقدسة جداً؛ ولا أريد التخلي عن الحياة إلا إذا كان ذلك ضرورياً تمامًا. أريدها أن أعيش بعمق وأجني كل عصير الحياة.

scores.feedback: The translation contains a critical error with Chinese characters embedded in the Arabic text ('当我'), severely compromising readability and accuracy. Additionally, key philosophical nuances are lost or distorted—'dear' is mistranslated as 'sacred' (مقدسة), 'resignation' becomes 'abandonment' (التخلي), and the poetic metaphor 'suck out all the marrow' becomes awkwardly 'reap all the juice,' losing Thoreau's deliberate intensity and philosophical depth.

results.translated_text: اسمي إسماعيل. منذ سنوات—لا يهم مدى دقة التوقيت—كنت لا أملك الكثير من المال في جيبي، ولم يكن هناك شيء خاص يثير اهتمامي على الشاطئ، ففكرت في أن أبحر قليلاً وأرى جزء العالم الذي يحيط بالمياه. هذا هو وسيلة لدي لأزيل الهموم وتنظيم الدورة الدموية. كلما شعرت بأن وجهي يتحول إلى الوجه القاتم؛ كلما كان هناك نوفمبر رطب ومتقطر في روحي، أعتبر أن الوقت قد حان للوصول إلى البحر بأسرع ما يمكن.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the core narrative meaning but loses some nuance in philosophical undertones and metaphorical depth. The archaic, introspective tone of the original is diminished, and certain expressions like 'driving off the spleen' become overly literal rather than maintaining the poetic melancholy of Melville's voice.

results.translated_text: אמונה מאמיתית, שבחור אعزב בעל נכסים טובים חייב להיות מבקש אישה. למרות שהרגשות או העדפות של בחור כזה לא ידועים לוודאי בעת הכניסתו הראשונה לhood, האמת הזו מוצבת היטב במinds של המשפחות הסמוכות, כך שהוא נחשב לملكיות מוסרית של אחת או אחרת מהבתות שלהם.

scores.feedback: The translation contains significant errors including untranslated Arabic words (أعزب, ملكيות), English words left in transliteration (hood, minds), and inconsistent Hebrew terminology that severely compromise meaning and readability. The ironic tone and formal Austenian style are completely lost due to these fundamental translation failures.

results.translated_text: הספריה הייתה מלאה באורו הרך של ענף רוזים, ובמהלך רוח הקיץ המלטת שמתעוררת בין העצים בגינה, מגיעים דרך הדלת הפתוחה ריח עז של צמח הקינמון, או הריח היקר של צמח השיניים הוריקן. מתוךコーナー של הספסל הפרסית עם שקיות מושבי מטוסים שבו היה מונח, ומدخן כבד כפי ש wasthis ת惯, לורד הרנרי ווטון היה יכול לקלוט את האור של הפרחים הוריקן הוריקן, שורש עולמו של הריח החומרי והזהוב.

scores.feedback: This translation is severely compromised by numerous errors including incorrect flower identifications (lilac translated as cinnamon, thorn as hurricane plant), corrupted text with mixed languages (コーナー, wasthis, ת惯), nonsensical phrases, and complete breakdown of the aesthetic sensibility central to Wilde's prose. The translation is essentially unusable.

results.translated_text: "אתה היה באפגניסטן, אני מודע." "איך לעזאזל לדעת את זה?" שאלתי בהפתעה. "לא חשוב," אמר הוא, צחק לעצמו. "השאלה כעת היא על המוגלבינן. אין ספק שאתה רואה את המשמעות של התגליה זו שלי?" "זה מעניין כيميיתית, אין ספק," עניתי, "אך בפועל—" "האם לא, חבר, זו התגליה המדויקת ביותר במדעים ההלתיים למשך שנים. לא רואית שנותן לנו اختبار בלתי נוצץ לדם?"

scores.feedback: The translation contains severe errors including grammatical mistakes ("אתה היה" is incorrect Hebrew), mixed Arabic script mid-translation, mistranslations of key terms ("המוגלבינן" for hemoglobin is awkward, "מדעים ההלתיים" is nonsensical), and awkward phrasing that obscures meaning. The dialogue becomes nearly incomprehensible in places, particularly in the final sentences.

results.translated_text: לפני היער כי רציתי לחיות בכוונה, להביט רק בעובדות חייו החשובות, ולבדוק אם לא אצליח ללמוד מהן מה שהן יכלו ל ensen, ולבחור שלא כשאני מת אמצא שטרחתי לחיות. לא רציתי לחיות משהו שאינו חיים, כי חיים הם מוערך כל כך; ולא רציתי לתרגל עייפות, אלא אם כן הייתה ממש חובה. רציתי לחיות עמוק ולשפוך את כל עלבון החיים.

scores.feedback: The translation contains severe errors including a nonsensical word ('ensen'), incorrect prepositions ('לפני' instead of 'אל'), mistranslations ('עייפות' for resignation, 'עלבון' for marrow), and grammatical issues that obscure Thoreau's philosophical meaning. The text is largely incomprehensible and fails to capture the deliberate, reflective tone of the original.

results.translated_text: зовו אותי איסhmael. כמה שנים тому—לא חשוב כמה זמן בדיוק—בהaving מעט או כמעט לא一分钱 בpurse שלי, וничто particulier להטרוג אותי ביבשה, חשבתי שאולך לרחוק מעט ולראות את החלק המימי של העולם. זהו אופן שאני מנסה למחוק את השינה ולשלוט בזרימה. בכל פעם שאני מוצא את עצמי מתרגל את השפה הגרועה שלי; בכל פעם שזה נובמבר לחוור וטמבל בלב שלי, אני מחשיב את זה כזaman טוב להתחיל לרדוף לים כבר עכשיו.

scores.feedback: This is not a legitimate translation—it contains extensive code-switching with Russian, Chinese, and English words interspersed throughout Hebrew text, making it incomprehensible. The Hebrew portions that exist contain numerous errors in grammar, vocabulary, and meaning that completely distort Melville's original text.

results.translated_text: C'est une vérité universellement reconnue, qu'un homme célibataire possédant une bonne fortune doit être en quête d'une épouse. Quelles que soient les sentiments ou les opinions de tel un homme lors de son arrivée dans un quartier, cette vérité est si bien ancrée dans l'esprit des familles du voisinage qu'on le considère comme la propriété exclusive de l'une ou l'autre de leurs filles.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the meaning accurately with minor grammatical issues ("les sentiments" should be "les sentiments" is correct, but "tel un homme" is awkward; should be "d'un tel homme"). The ironic tone is mostly preserved, though the fluency is slightly compromised by the phrasing "en quête d'une épouse" which feels less natural than alternatives, and "quartier" is an odd choice for neighborhood in this context.

results.translated_text: L’atelier était rempli de l’odeur intense des roses, et lorsque le léger vent d’été agitait les arbres du jardin, il parvenait jusqu’à la porte ouverte l’odeur lourde du lilas ou le parfum plus délicat de l’aubépine à fleurs roses. Du coin du divan recouvert de sacs à dos persans sur lequel il était allongé, fumant, comme c’était sa coutume, un nombre incalculable de cigarettes, Lord Henry Wotton pouvait à peine apercevoir l’éclat des fleurs de la labourne, douces et dorées comme du miel.

scores.feedback: The translation preserves most meaning and aesthetic sensibility, but 'sacs à dos persans' (Persian backpacks) is an awkward mistranslation of 'saddle-bags,' and the phrase structure occasionally feels forced compared to Wilde's flowing prose. The sensory richness is largely maintained but with minor losses in elegance.

results.translated_text: « Vous avez été en Afghanistan, je le vois. » « Comment diable avez-vous pu le savoir ? » lui demandai-je, étonné. « Ne vous en faites pas », dit-il en riant tout seul. « La question maintenant porte sur l'hémoglobine. Ne voyez-vous pas l'importance de cette découverte ? » « C'est intéressant, du point de vue chimique, je n'en doute pas », répondis-je, « mais en pratique — » « Pourquoi, monsieur, c'est la découverte la plus pratique, médico-légal, depuis des années. Ne voyez-vous pas qu'elle nous donne un test infaillible pour les taches de sang ? »

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the meaning and captures Holmes's deductive brilliance and Watson's astonishment, though 'du point de vue chimique' is slightly more formal than the original's simplicity, and 'médico-légal' lacks proper agreement (should be 'médico-légale' or restructured). Minor awkwardness in phrasing slightly impacts natural flow.

results.translated_text: Je suis allé dans les bois parce que je voulais vivre délibérément, ne faire face qu'aux faits essentiels de la vie, et voir si je ne pourrais pas apprendre ce qu'elle avait à m'apprendre, et ne pas, lors de ma mort, découvrir que je n'avais pas vraiment vécu. Je ne voulais pas vivre ce qui n'était pas la vie, la vie étant si précieuse ; ni pratiquer la résignation, sauf si cela devenait absolument nécessaire. Je voulais vivre profondément et tirer toutes les moelles de la vie.

scores.feedback: The translation faithfully preserves Thoreau's meaning and philosophical intent with only minor deviations (e.g., 'vraiment' adds emphasis not in original, 'tirer toutes les moelles' is slightly awkward compared to 'suck out all the marrow'). The prose flows naturally in French, though some of the original's rhythmic intensity is slightly diminished in the final clause.

results.translated_text: Appelez-moi Ishmaël. Il y a quelques années — ne vous souciez pas de savoir précisément depuis combien de temps —, avec peu ou pas d'argent dans ma bourse, et rien de particulier pour m'intéresser sur terre, je pensais que je ferais bien de faire un peu de navigation et de voir la partie aquatique du monde. C'est une manière que j'ai d'expulser la bile et de réguler la circulation. Chaque fois que je me trouve à prendre un air sombre ; chaque fois que novembre humide et pluvieux s'installe dans mon âme, je considère qu'il est grand temps de me rendre à la mer aussi vite que possible.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of the meaning faithfully, though 'expulser la bile' (expel bile) is less idiomatic than the original 'driving off the spleen,' and some archaic flavor is diminished. The prose reads naturally in French but lacks the distinctive voice and rhythmic quality of Melville's original opening.

results.translated_text: Es ist ein allgemein anerkannter Grundsatz, dass ein lediger Mann, der über ein gutes Vermögen verfügt, eine Ehefrau benötigt. Auch wenn die Gefühle oder Ansichten solch eines Mannes bei seinem ersten Eintreten in eine Nachbarschaft noch so wenig bekannt sind, ist diese Wahrheit so tief in den Gemütern der umgebenden Familien verwurzelt, dass er als das rechtmäßige Eigentum einer oder anderer ihrer Töchter angesehen wird.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the meaning and captures the ironic tone of Austen's opening, though 'Grundsatz' (principle) is slightly less elegant than 'Wahrheit' (truth) for the original's philosophical weight. The phrasing is generally natural but occasionally feels more formal/wooden than the original's flowing irony, particularly in the second sentence's construction.

results.translated_text: Das Atelier war voller des reichen Geruchs von Rosen, und als der leichte Sommerwind durch die Bäume des Gartens wehte, drang durch die offene Tür der schwere Duft der Lilien oder der feinere Geruch des pinkblühenden Dornstrauches herein. Von der Ecke des Divans aus persischen Satteltaschen, auf dem er lag und, wie es seine Gewohnheit war, unzählige Zigaretten rauchte, konnte Lord Henry Wotton gerade noch den Schimmer der honigsüßen und honigfarbenen Blüten eines Laburnums erkennen.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately captures most of Wilde's sensory details and aesthetic language, though 'Lilien' (lilies) for 'lilac' is a significant error that affects meaning. The German reads somewhat formally and the sentence structure becomes unwieldy, particularly in the final clause, losing some of the original's flowing elegance.

results.translated_text: „Du warst in Afghanistan, ich spüre es.“ „Wie zum Teufel konntest du das wissen?“, fragte ich erstaunt. „Nicht wichtig“, sagte er, lachend vor sich hin. „Die Frage ist jetzt die Hämoglobin. Zweifellos siehst du die Bedeutung dieser Entdeckung von mir?“ „Es ist interessant, chemisch, zweifellos“, antwortete ich, „aber praktisch –“ „Warum, Mensch, es ist die wichtigste praktische medizinisch-rechtliche Entdeckung in Jahren. Siehst du nicht, dass sie uns einen unfehlbaren Test für Blutspuren gibt?“

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meaning accurately but has notable issues: the informal 'du' instead of formal 'Sie' breaks character consistency for Victorian-era dialogue, 'ich spüre es' (I sense it) weakens Holmes's deductive certainty, and awkward phrasing like 'Die Frage ist jetzt die Hämoglobin' and 'Warum, Mensch' disrupts natural German flow and period-appropriate formality.

results.translated_text: Ich ging in den Wald, weil ich bewusst leben wollte, nur den wesentlichen Tatsachen des Lebens gegenüberzustehen und zu sehen, ob ich nicht lernen könnte, was es zu lehren hatte, und nicht, als ich sterben würde, zu entdecken, dass ich nicht wirklich gelebt hatte. Ich wollte nicht das Leben leben, was kein Leben ist, denn das Leben ist so kostbar; auch wollte ich keine Ergebung üben, es sei denn, sie war unumgänglich. Ich wollte tief leben und alle Knochenmark des Lebens aussaugen.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most of Thoreau's philosophical meaning and existential urgency, but suffers from awkward phrasing in places ("alle Knochenmark" is grammatically incorrect; should be "das ganze Mark") and slightly stiff construction that doesn't fully match the original's rhythmic eloquence. The core ideas are preserved well.

results.translated_text: Nenn mich Ishmael. Vor einigen Jahren — es spielt keine Rolle, wie lange genau — mit kaum oder gar keinem Geld in meiner Tasche und nichts Besonderes, das mich am Ufer interessieren könnte, dachte ich, ich würde ein wenig reisen und die wasserbedeckte Hälfte der Welt sehen. Es ist eine Art, die ich habe, um die Leber zu entlasten und den Kreislauf zu regulieren. Jedes Mal, wenn ich merke, dass sich meine Lippen verhärteten; jedes Mal, wenn es in meiner Seele ein feuchter, regnerischer November wird, dann ist es mir rechtzeitig, so schnell wie möglich auf See zu gehen.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the basic narrative but loses significant nuance and archaic tone. Key issues include 'Leber entlasten' (liver relief) instead of the idiomatic 'spleen,' awkward phrasing like 'wasserbedeckte Hälfte' (water-covered half) for 'watery part,' and 'sich meine Lippen verhärteten' (my lips hardened) instead of 'growing grim about the mouth.' The archaic, philosophical voice of Melville's prose is substantially diminished.

results.translated_text: Es un axioma universalmente reconocido que un hombre soltero en posesión de una buena fortuna debe necesitar una esposa. Sin importar cuán poco conocidos sean los sentimientos o opiniones de un hombre así al primer momento en que entra en un vecindario, esta verdad está tan firmemente arraigada en las mentes de las familias vecinas que se lo considera la propiedad legítima de alguna una de sus hijas.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately preserves the meaning and captures Austen's ironic tone through word choices like 'axioma' and 'propiedad legítima.' However, minor fluency issues exist: 'alguna una' appears to be a typo, and the phrasing is occasionally more literal than natural Spanish prose would be, slightly diminishing the elegant irony of the original.

results.translated_text: El estudio estaba lleno del intenso aroma de las rosas, y cuando el ligero viento de verano se movía entre los árboles del jardín, llegaba por la puerta abierta el intenso aroma del lirio de la paz o el más delicado perfume del espino con flores rosadas. Desde la esquina del diván de bolsas de silla persa sobre el cual yacía, fumando, como era su costumbre, innumerables cigarrillos, lord Henry Wotton apenas podía divisar el fulgor de las dulces y de color miel flores del laburno.

scores.feedback: The translation captures most meanings accurately but loses some aesthetic precision: 'lirio de la paz' (peace lily) misidentifies 'lilac,' and 'bolsas de silla persa' (Persian saddle-bags) is awkwardly phrased. The sensory richness and Wildean elegance are diminished by repetitive word choices ('intenso aroma' twice) and awkward constructions like 'dulces y de color miel' that disrupt the flowing, ornate style of the original.

results.translated_text:
—Has estado en Afganistán, lo percibo —dije.  
—¿Cómo diablos lo supiste? —pregunté, asombrado.  
—No importa —dijo, riéndose para sí mismo—. Ahora la cuestión es sobre la hemoglobina. ¿No ves la importancia de este descubrimiento mío?  
—Es interesante, sin duda, desde el punto de vista químico —respondí—, pero en la práctica…  
—¡Por Dios, hombre! Es el descubrimiento más práctico en el ámbito médico-legal de los últimos años. ¿No ves que nos da una prueba infalible para detectar manchas de sangre?

scores.feedback: The translation contains a significant error in the first line attribution (Holmes's words are incorrectly attributed to Watson), and the dialogue structure is confused, disrupting the original's logical flow. While the Spanish is generally fluent and captures most technical terms accurately, these structural issues and minor tone shifts (e.g., '¡Por Dios!' vs. the more measured 'Why, man') compromise both accuracy and style fidelity.

results.translated_text: Fui al bosque porque deseaba vivir deliberadamente, enfrentar solo los hechos esenciales de la vida y ver si podía aprender lo que tenía que enseñar, y no, al llegar a morir, descubrir que no había vivido. No deseaba vivir lo que no era vida, ya que la vida es tan preciada; tampoco deseaba practicar la resignación, a menos que fuera absolutamente necesaria. Quería vivir profundamente y extraer toda la esencia de la vida.

scores.feedback: The translation preserves the philosophical meaning and structure well, with accurate rendering of Thoreau's key concepts like 'deliberadamente' and 'vivir profundamente.' Minor stylistic adjustments—such as 'extraer toda la esencia' for 'suck out all the marrow' and 'ya que' instead of a more emphatic connector—slightly soften the original's intensity and rhetorical force, though the overall effect remains powerful and readable.

results.translated_text: Llamenme Ishmael. Hace algunos años—no importa cuánto exactamente—con poco o ningún dinero en mi bolsillo, y nada en particular que me interesara en tierra, pensé que me gustaría navegar un poco y ver la parte acuática del mundo. Es una manera que tengo de alejar la bilis y regular la circulación. Cada vez que me encuentro con el ceño fruncido; cada vez que siento un noviembre húmedo y lluvioso en mi alma, considero que es hora de irme al mar lo antes posible.

scores.feedback: The translation captures the essential meaning and narrative voice reasonably well, but loses some of the archaic formality and poetic nuance of the original. Phrases like 'driving off the spleen' become 'alejar la bilis' (accurate but less idiomatic), and 'growing grim about the mouth' becomes 'con el ceño fruncido' (a reasonable interpretation but not the exact image). The opening 'Llamenme' is slightly awkward compared to the more natural 'Llámame.'

results.translated_text: È un fatto universalmente riconosciuto che un uomo singolo in possesso di una buona fortuna debba necessariamente cercare una moglie. Tuttavia, per quanto poco noti possano essere i sentimenti o le opinioni di un tale uomo al suo primo entrare in una comunità, questa verità è così profondamente radicata nei pensieri delle famiglie circostanti che si ritiene che lui sia la proprietà legittima di una delle loro figlie.

scores.feedback: The translation accurately conveys the meaning and captures Austen's ironic tone about marriage expectations, though 'comunità' is slightly less precise than 'neighbourhood' and some phrasing feels slightly more formal than the original's elegant simplicity. The structure and wit are well-preserved overall.
